faq.question: How does Workforce OS work for Packaging & Fulfillment companies in Portland?
faq.answer: Workforce OS provides automated crew dispatch, real-time worker tracking, and mobile-first tools built specifically for Packaging & Fulfillment businesses operating in the Portland metro area.

faq.question: Do you support OR labor regulations?
faq.answer: Yes. Workforce OS includes built-in compliance tracking for OR-specific labor requirements, helping Portland businesses avoid violations.

faq.question: What does it cost?
faq.answer: Pricing starts at $2,500-$5,000/mo per month depending on workforce size and features.

faq.answer: We serve 100+ businesses across the 2.5M Portland metro area, with growing adoption among Packaging & Fulfillment contractors.
